summary: Iteration 2 testing of Spot'd. Backend: 10/10 new pytest cases pass (test_iteration2.py) covering imported data verification (60 profiles, 57 PRO subs with cineconnect-import payment_reference & ~365d expiry, all imported profiles have spot_score>0 and lowercase-hyphen slugs), bulk-import endpoint (admin auth required: non-admin=403, unauth=401, admin=200), bulk-import idempotency (re-running same payload creates 0 new users), Postmark webhook (accepts arbitrary JSON & empty body, persists to postmark_events; verified 2 docs in DB after tests), Stripe renewal webhook no-crash on invalid signature (returns received:true). Iteration 1 regression: 20/21 still pass; only test_brendan_profile_seeded fails because Brendan's spot_score legitimately re-percentiled from 41 to 23 after the 57 CineConnect imports — this is expected dataset evolution, not a bug; iter1 test assertion is now stale. Frontend: complete OTP login → AgeGate flow validated end-to-end. /create-profile redirects unauth users to /login?next=%2Fcreate-profile. AgeGate appears on first visit for new users. Adult flow: 18-or-older → terms checkbox required → continue enabled → gate closes → form visible with minor-toggle-section (OFF) and responsible-adult-section (hidden). Minor flow: Under-18 → consent + terms checkboxes both required → continue enabled → gate closes → form shows minor-toggle-section (ON, data-state=checked) and responsible-adult-section visible with all 4 fields (name, relationship Select, email, phone). Toggle persists state (off->on shows RA section, on->off hides it). Dashboard ShareSpotScoreCard works: dashboard-share-spotscore button opens Dialog with story/square format toggle, Download PNG, and Share buttons; canvas renders score with TOP 5% badge, name, role, location. Imported user /u/tara-ponsford redirects to /profile/tara-ponsford and renders Tara Ponsford profile with About + Professional Details sections.

minor.issue: Imported list always includes users with user_created=false (existing users still appear in 'imported' details on idempotent re-runs). The idempotency works correctly (no duplicate users/profiles/subs created), but the response semantically conflates 'newly imported' with 'already existed'. Consider reporting reused users in 'skipped' instead of 'imported' for clearer ops feedback.

Endpoint is unauthenticated and stores raw payload — anyone can inject arbitrary records into postmark_events collection. Should validate via Postmark webhook signing or basic-auth header in production.
No auth required — returns full profile docs including phone/email of imported users. Consider hiding contact fields for unauthenticated requests (already partially done elsewhere).

issues: With Playwright force=True clicks during framer-motion AnimatePresence step transitions, clicks on age-gate-under-btn occasionally don't register because the prior step's motion.div is still animating out. Without force=True the click waits properly and works. Not user-facing (real users click slowly enough), but make sure E2E tests do NOT use force=True on these buttons.

action_items: Update /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py::TestSeed::test_brendan_profile_seeded — drop the hard-coded spot_score==41 assertion (or change to assert isinstance(spot_score,int) and spot_score>0), since adding the 57 CineConnect profiles changed Brendan's percentile and absolute score. Same for spot_percentile==99 (now will differ).
(Optional) Add Postmark webhook signature verification before storing events, or restrict endpoint to expected source IPs.
(Optional) Differentiate 'reused' vs 'newly imported' in bulk-import response — currently both go into 'imported' list distinguished only by user_created flag inside each detail.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1507 lines (was 1298 in iter1) — beyond 700-line guideline. Consider splitting bulk-import + webhooks + stripe handlers into a /app/backend/routers/ subpackage.
_send_welcome_internal duplicates HTML template logic from the public sendWelcomeEmail function — consider extracting a shared template renderer.

bulk_import does sequential await db.profiles.find_one for slug uniqueness inside a while loop — for the seed batch (57 records) this is fine, but for larger imports consider batching with a Mongo aggregation or pre-computing taken slugs once.

AgeGate uses framer-motion AnimatePresence with key={step} — works for users but creates a brief overlapping-element window during transition. Consider mode='wait' (already set) is good; ensure clicks on new step buttons aren't dispatched while old step is exiting (current implementation is fine for real interaction).

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 iter2 + 20/21 iter1, the 1 fail is a stale assertion not a code bug)
success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (AgeGate adult+minor, minor toggle, share dialog, imported profile page)

test_credentials: Admin: brendan@shadowwolvesproductions.com.au (OTP, dev_code returned in /api/auth/request-code response in mock mode). New test users created with random emails per run (testage*@example.com, testminor*@example.com, TEST_BULK_*@example.com).
seed_data_creation: TestBulkImport class created 2 users TEST_BULK_a@example.com and TEST_BULK_b@example.com with profiles & subscriptions (payment_reference='test-bulk-import') — these persist in DB and were used to verify idempotency. Several testage*/testminor* user accounts also persist from frontend OTP login tests but have no profile/subscription. Postmark webhook tests inserted 2 events into postmark_events collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DB now has 60 profiles total (1 admin + 57 CineConnect + 2 TEST_BULK), 60 subscriptions, 2 postmark_events. Brendan's spot_score is now 23 (not 41) and spot_percentile shifted from 99 — adjust any iter1 hard-coded score assertions. /api/admin/bulk-import requires admin Bearer token. AgeGate localStorage key is likely 'spotd_age_gate_v1' or similar — test runs use new email per run to avoid persisted gate-completed state. ShareSpotScoreCard uses html2canvas client-side; 'Share' button uses navigator.share on mobile and falls back to download. Postmark + Twilio still mocked (EMAIL_MOCK_MODE=true).
